prose: Pyridine frontier-orbital gap computed via DFT using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Input geometry from user-supplied .xyz file; single-point calculation (not re-optimized). SCF converged in 10 cycles. HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.140 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap). HOMO energy: −7.253 eV; LUMO energy: −1.113 eV. Integrity: OK (trustworthy). No warnings reported.
